name: Norwegian Cake Doughnuts (Hjortebakkels)
recipeIngredient: Juice and zest of one lemon
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs until lemon-colored.
2. Add sugar, flour, butter, whipping cream, baking powder, baking soda, lemon juice, and zest to the dough. Mix until a stiff dough forms.
3. Let the dough stand overnight.
4. Form the dough into a roll as wide as your finger.
5. Cut into 3-inch lengths and form circles by overlapping the ends, or roll out to 1/4 inch thick and cut with a lightly floured doughnut cutter.
6. Deep-fry at 350 degrees Fahrenheit, turning frequently until puffed and brown.
7. Sprinkle with sugar and cardamom to taste.
Each doughnut contains about: 229 calories; 52 mg sodium; 70 mg cholesterol; 6 grams fat; 38 grams carbohydrates; 5 grams protein; 0.11 gram fiber.
